scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.db:validate:phase5: node ./scripts/phase5a-programme-map-validation.mjs && node ./scripts/phase5b-greencomp-validation.mjs && node ./scripts/phase5c-greencomp-expectations-validation.mjs && node ./scripts/phase5c-lifecomp-validation.mjs && node ./scripts/phase5f-entrecomp-validation.mjs && node ./scripts/phase5g-digcomp-validation.mjs && node ./scripts/phase5j-curriculum-design-layers-validation.mjs
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
